hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git commit' && git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM | grep -E '\.py$' | xargs -r .venv/Scripts/python -m black 2>/dev/null || true; }
hooks.statusMessage: Running black on staged Python files...

allow: Bash(find "C:\\Users\\covec\\OneDrive\\Cordell, Leslie & Audrey\\Photo Albums" -name *.xmp -exec grep -l subphotos:s*[s*{ {})
